entry.title: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to enable the self-registration for an application registered in our SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant. Activating the self-registration and adding some information available in "User Attributes for Access" is fine and working.

But, we also want the user to enter the "Login name" (which we use as SSO attribute). Unfortunately, we cannot add this to the self-registration form. As we only allow internal users we could probably call an API to determine the Login name based on the email address as this would be available in a central repository.

How can ensure that the login name is set on self registration (either by entering in the according form or by some logic) before the first real login of the user?

entry.title: Possible to use different weights/ratings in PM Form per user type
entry.content:
Hi, 

Our client requested a very customized scenario, but I'm not sure it's possible (I actually think it will not be possible but I want to double check). 

They have 3 Objective Sections in the PM Template. Every section weight is used for the Overall Rating Calculation. But the section weight should be different depending on the user type. 

E.g., user from department A should have section weight 20% for a particular section, while user from department B should have section weight 30% for a particular section. 

I don't think this is possible? The only workaround I see, is that you create different PM forms per user type (in which the section weight is different). 

Thx a lot! 

Kind regards, 

Ellen

entry.title: Re: XREF1, XREF2, XREF3 in MIRO - the ultimate solution
entry.content: I used the above solution, and during testing, I noticed that the information entered in MIRO is transferred exclusively to the first line of the accounting entry — to the liabilities account. I would be more interested in having this information added to the cost account. Could we transfer this information to specific lines of the accounting entry based on predefined categories?

entry.title: Re: Calculate times in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

Did you find a solution or workaround for this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori elements extension: upload Excel files to create new entries using building blocks
entry.content:
Hi,
also with 1.120 we supported the file uploader when using a stream property and we already introduced the support of singletons, so yes you should be able to implement the same also with 1.120.

Regarding your second question, I understand your feedback, and I second you that omitting this dialog but showing the file selector dialog directly would be a better approach. Unfortunately, this is currently not supported. We don't yet allow adding a file uploader directly into the table action section, it has to be an action. If you place it above the table (by still using our field building block) you can omit the dialog - but I understand user would expect this action in the table toolbar.

Another option would be to use the table with the file uploader plugin:

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableUpload

After clicking on upload, the file browser is shown immediately. But this plugin expects a stream property to exist in the entity type, and after selecting a file, a new instance is created and the file is put to the stream property of this newly created entity. This does not fit to your need as well.

The best solution would be to allow to add a file uploader into the action toolbar. This would be a new requirement for SAP Fiori elements for OData v4.

Best regards,
Marcel

entry.title: Re: Line Limit in Stories -SAC
entry.content: Try to Reduce the number of Cost centres or try to change the filters.

entry.title: WF Lockbox Not Posted Completely For 12/30/2024
entry.content:
Hi Team

WF lockbox statement only posted 25 documents out of 50 documents from the bank file for the date 12/30/2024.

how do we process the remaining 25 documents which are not posted, please assist as it is impacting other invoices in production.

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: still issue: Can you post any sample code for STO with movement type 351

entry.title: Re: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @roy_jin 

It seems like the access to the video is restricted. 

Best regards, 
Tim

entry.title: unique National Insurance (NI) number for each employee profile
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are facing an issue in Success Factors Employee Central (EC) where the system requires a unique National Insurance (NI) number for each employee profile. This prevents us from rehiring former employees with their original NI number and a new person-id-external (Employee ID). It also affects temporary or contract workers transitioning into permanent roles, as their NI number remains unchanged.

Our proposed solution is to allow the system to accept the same NI number for new employee profiles, as long as other unique identifiers (such as Employee ID) are different. We also want the NI number to be validated for format correctness but not treated as a unique identifier within the system.

We would like to understand how other organizations have handled this scenario. Have you encountered this issue, and if so, what solutions or workarounds have you implemented?

Looking forward to your insights and suggestions

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Windows Keyboard delay
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

As you mentioned some of the user's key inputs are delayed in SAPGUI 800, have you checked the end user's laptop or desktop for overall memory and CPU usage? Or are any other applications consuming excessive memory and CPU resources?

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Career shift from ABAP to AL/ML
entry.content:
This is my personal opinion, and all the paths are different. 

You can keep the ABAP experience and study at the same time AI/LM. 
I think in the future you will not program anymore AI/ML algorithm from scratch but you will only use API and service already made. 

1) ABAP will never left completely but yes, if you know only ABAP it's a problem for me. When you said that you have 18 years of experience in ABAP, do you know RAP? Do you know how to develop a CDS and oData service? For me for that it's fine right now. My suggestion is maybe look little bit on CAP maybe next step. 

2) About areas and modules, it's a big question. We have so much AI right now, but we have no use cases. And the use cases the customer wants SAP to cover it. Take a look on the Discovery site in the section AI, but this is more an architect and less developer. https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/ai-catalog/

3) My suggestion is yes. I mean, if you want to develop an AI workflow or a model, BTP has the tool to do it, and you should learn BTP. Right now, everything to project a new model can do in the SAP AI Core service: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core?locale=en-US

4)

entry.title: Re: How to delete work scheduling view -
entry.content:
Hello @johnsplit123 ,

Kindly refer below link to check solution posted in the past.

Solved: Permanently deleting views in material master - SAP Community

My suggestion is don't try this solution directly in live environment, if you have opportunity then test it somewhere with dummy data for assurance and then go for it.

In case of impact is for multiple materials, you can try the solution with proper testing, if impact is with single material and it's not used anywhere then you can apply deletion flag and then go for new material.

Share your feedback after you have some solution, Thanks!🙂

entry.title: Error in clearing reprocess bank statements
entry.content:
Hello Community,

 

We are facing an issue while clearing reprocess bank statements in SAP Cloud. The system throws the error. "999 line items reached" even when I split the process in to smaller batches. This error persists during subsequent steps clearing, making it challenging to complete the transaction. Are there any recommended best practices or alternative methods for processing this type of statement.

Attached the error screenshot

Your guidance and suggestions will be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: Generate an ID number in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am creating a process automation form in SAP Build Process Automation. I am trying to configure the form to generate an auto-generated sequential ID number and send it by email to the approver.

I used the script option, but it does not seem to be working.

Do you have any guidelines on how to achieve this?

1B6

entry.title: User exit in <Ustrd> field
entry.content:
Hi, I am using a custom user exit for extending the field <Ustrd> in payment DMEE XML file. The field is extended to 1500 chars and user exit is concatenating all remitance info for all invoices. However, although the values in debug appear correctly in C_VALUE parameter - the <Ustrd> not does not appear at all in XML file even though the status of the file is set as standard and there are no conditions. The note to payee is also not assigned anymore to the payment method.

Thank you very much in advance for any help.

Kasia

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: st_goodsmvt_code-gm_code = '03'. "goods issue

entry.title: Re: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content: Yes, they do but we have not yet connected the Corporate Identity Provider with our Cloud Identity Service. This is still on our roadmap. Reason we have not yet connected: There is no group mapping available in our Corporate Identity Provider, so we nonetheless would required users in the Cloud Identity Service. But we do not want to provision all users from the corporate identity provider to the identity directory within the IAS. If there would be an option to automatically create a user in IAS on first login via the corporate identity provider, that might be an option

entry.title: Re: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content: Why do you not want to provision the users? And why do you not integrate to the Corporate IdP? With the current setup the users will have two passwords.

entry.title: Re: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content: because of slow internal processes and different responsibilities (I will not go in more details) I'm trying to find alternative solutions...

entry.title: Re: CPI Helper is not working for few tenant
entry.content: Good morning! any solution for this case?

entry.title: Education and Tuition Reimbursement in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi

We have a requirement from a customer to validate that the Education Reimbursement/Claim amount entered in SuccessFactors Global Benefits/Custom MDF matches the amount on the attached invoice/proof. Essentially, we are looking for an OCR tool to perform this validation, which should work with SuccessFactors.

Additionally, we are considering whether it's possible to manage education reimbursements through Concur. My understanding is that Concur may not fully support education reimbursements due to varying entitlements for different dependent children, such as 5000 for the first child, 7000 for the second child, and so on. Concur doesn't have these dependent details to validate this.

If users enter the claim in SuccessFactors, can we send this information to Concur for validation using its OCR capabilities?

Thanks for the help.

@karenperez @brendas

entry.title: Assignement abap user roles by Cloud Identity Services from Entra Azure
entry.content:
Hello,

I need some help with Cloud Identity Services (CIS) : I need to manage the user in ABAP environnement (ECC and S/4) from Entra Azure.

So I've managed to create and update a User with certain information. But I also want to manage role assignement. To simplify the process I'm using the group assignement in Azure and use the description field to write the role I want to add to the users. The role is an existing role on the ABAP environnement.

I've seen that we can get the list of the groups for each user from the source system (Entra) - But I don't know if we can and How to use it to assign a role on the target system (SAP ECC and/or S/4 ).

Thanks in advance,

Regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Understand DMS API – Free Postman Collection!!
entry.content:
In my videos introducing the Document Management Service, I received some comments asking for the Postman Collection I used to show how the API works.

So I decided to release Postman collection, and write a short blog post to explain how the APIs work.

You can see all my DMS videos in the DMS playlist - more to come soon: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hLrCoHPwqT4&list=PL6RpkC85SLQCsKSvIOqMzFKW30B4TKXh-

 

How the APIs Work

There's 2 API Sets

The APIs are described on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, but lo and behold, there are 2 separate sets of APIs:

  • CMIS Compliant – API Reference: Most of the APIs for working with content are compliant with CMIS, an industry standard for APIs that call content management systems. 
     
  • SAP REST API – API Reference: These have more to do with creating a repo and administrative tasks.

Objects

The contents of the repo are objects, which contain CMIS-defined properties. Some of the more notable properties:

  • cmis:objectId: Unique ID for that object
  • cmis:objectTypeId: Indicates the type of object, generally document (cmis:document) or folder (cmis:folder)
  • cmis:name: Name for that object
  • cmis:parentIds: Object ID of the folders that contain this object
  • ... you can also get the owner, creation date, modified date, version, mime type of document type and more. DMS has complex capabilities, like version or encryption, and those are beyond the scope of this blog post.

 

"properties": {
	"cmis:objectId": {
		"id": "cmis:objectId",
		"localName": "cmis:objectId",
		"displayName": "cmis:objectId",
		"queryName": "cmis:objectId",
		"type": "id",
		"cardinality": "single",
		"value": "DzX04u_1PD5uNT2IfcmNzztROjky-92pHkAK1-SoE5U"
	},
	"cmis:name": {
		"id": "cmis:name",
		"localName": "cmis:name",
		"displayName": "cmis:name",
		"queryName": "cmis:name",
		"type": "string",
		"cardinality": "single",
		"value": "invoice_id-1731489392337-28"
	},
	"cmis:objectTypeId": {
		"id": "cmis:objectTypeId",
		"localName": "cmis:objectTypeId",
		"displayName": "cmis:objectTypeId",
		"queryName": "cmis:objectTypeId",
		"type": "id",
		"cardinality": "single",
		"value": "cmis:folder"
	}
}

 

Note that the property names start with cmis. When working with the properties, you need to use this namespace. This affects how you write some of the URLs (such as the query call) as well as selecting properties in the formula editor of SAP Build Apps (see below).

SAP Build Apps Formula Editor

Since the property names have a colon in them (:), you will need to use an alternate form for specifying those fields in the formula editor of SAP Build Apps.

For example, if you use the standard format, the formula editor will give an error:

Instead, you need to put such properties inside parentheses:

Queries

All but one of the calls are standard REST calls, and similar to many other REST APIs. But there is a query call, that lets you write SQL-esque statements to retrieve objects. 

For example, if I want to retrieve all of the documents for a folder with a specific ID, and return only the name property, I could use the following URL: 

 

https://{{endpoint}}/browser/{{repo}}?cmisSelector=query&
q=SELECT cmis:name FROM cmis:folder WHERE
cmis:objectId='DzX04u_1PD5uNT2IfcmNzztROjky-92pHkAK1-SoE5U'

 

To get the full OASIS documentation on writing queries, see their documentation.

 

Postman Collection

You can download the collection here: https://github.com/sap-tutorials/sap-build-apps/blob/main/projects/dms/DMS_CMIS.postman_collection.json

In order to use the requests, you will need to set up an environment that supplies the following properties:

 

clientid
clientsecret
endpoint
authenticationurl
repo

 

The first 4 you will get from the service key of your DMS Integration Option service.

The service key will look something like this:

The repo you get when you run the API for all your repos:

IMPORTANT:

  • Some of the requests in the collection contain example objectIDs or file names, which of course will not work on your tenants. So you will have to change those.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: Try 04 for transfer

entry.title: Billing Relevance G in execution order items in Service with Advanced Execution
entry.content:
The concept of Billing Relevance in Service with Advanced Execution is already explained in a previous blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/billing-relevance-in-execution-order-item/ba-p/13574529

This blog is to showcase the Service with Advanced execution process flow with billing relevance which is Itemized Billing (Key = G). This billing method is only available with advanced execution.

Itemized Billing is a billing scenario which uses the dynamic item processor (DIP) to bill services. This is a variant of resource-related billing which means customers are charged based on actuals.

In general, the price for tailor-made services can neither be defined in a service contract nor in the pricing master.

Typical examples of this are:

  • Industries which generally charge on actuals,
  • Specific services, such as consulting

In these cases, customers are billed for the resources consumed (for example, personnel, material, travel) to carry out the services. In resource-related billing, the system creates dynamic items from the cost information on the maintenance order.

The following steps depicts the process flow for Itemized Billing:

1. Create a service order and add an execution order item.

Service Order with an execution order item

2. Navigate to the item overview page in Edit mode, scroll down to the Billing assignment block and change Billing Relevance to Itemized Billing and enter a DIP Profile.

The dynamic item processor (DIP) profile is mandatory in the case of resource-related billing. During billing, the dynamic item processor determines the items or lines in the debit memo request, from the costs on the maintenance order, based on the DIP Profile entered in the execution order item in the service order.

Note: The DIP Profile entered in the service order must be assigned with Usage 1 Billing.

Billing assignment block in an execution order item

3. Release the item and save the service order.

Item status after creation of maintenance order

Maintenance order is generated, and the execution status of execution order item is set to Execution Planning.

4. Release the maintenance order after planning, to start execution.

Releasing the maintenance order

5. Create PM confirmations using Fiori app ‘Enter PM Order Confirmation’.

Enter PM Order Confirmation app

6. Fill in the actual work hours taken for the execution of operations and save.

PM Confirmation

Optionally, you can use the Final Confirmation checkbox to indicate that this is the last posting of actuals for an operation.

Final PM Confirmation

7. Open Post Goods Movement Fiori app to post goods issue for the actual components and quantities used.

Goods Issue

8. Open the Create Resource-Related Billing Request - Service Order app or you can use the transaction code DP92 to launch the screen in SAP GUI. Enter the service order ID and the execution order item. Then click Create.

Create Resource- Related Billing Request app

The system displays costs as shown below. The material determination is performed using the DIP profile and actuals are displayed from the data on the maintenance order. The actuals can be seen either in the form of amounts or quantities.

You can set the quantity or the amount to be billed. You can also reject or postpone partially by quantity or amount.

Billing request: Expense view

The prices are determined using SD Pricing and this is shown in Sales Price View.

Billing Request: Sales Price View

9. Select the Billing Request button to generate a debit memo request (DMR).

Create Billing Request

Debit Memo Request in Fiori app

Debit Memo Request

This is another view of the same Debit Memo Request which shows the item categories of the items. L2S here represents a statistical item whereas L2W will be billable. This is the distinct behavior with itemized billing – the main item, which is item 10, will be statistical and the subitems will be considered to calculate net value.

10. The Transfer to Billing is set as Successful and DMR references are updated in the Billing and Transaction History assignment blocks respectively in the execution order item overview page.

Billing assignment block after DMR creation

Transaction history assignment block after DMR creation

11. Open the Create Billing Documents app and search using the Debit Memo Request ID. Select the document from the search result and choose Create Billing Documents.

Create Billing Documents app

Lastly, you can post the Billing Document to accounting, to complete the process.

Post Billing Document

12. Open the Billing assignment block in execution order item again, you can see that the Billing Status is updated as Partially billed.

Billing assignment block after invoice creation

Itemized billing can be performed multiple times for a given execution order item and hence it could lead to multiple debit memo requests depending on number of billing runs. This is typically required when we have a long running service (say, 6 months) and we need to perform billing once every month.

entry.title: Need to enable HTTPS for JAVA SCS node
entry.content:
Please help us with the steps involved to enable HTTPS in  JAVA SCS node.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to enable HTTPS for JAVA SCS node
entry.content:
Hello,

A similar question was answered on this thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/how-to-config-ssl-in-this-senario/m-p/7043136

To enable an HTTPS port on the Message Server, configure the port with the profile parameter "ms/server_port_X".

The KBA 3339092 shows how to configure the SSL certificate for the SCS.

But notice that using the Message Server for load balance is not supported, and an SAP Web Dispatcher must be used instead (SAP Note 1040325).

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Requesting for SAP FICO practice materials
entry.content: Discover a variety of free learning resources to enhance your SAP skills and prepare for certification

entry.title: Extending Fiori Elements App Deployed on SAP BTP using Adaptation Project
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to create an adaptation project to extend a Fiori Elements app deployed on SAP BTP CF. However, I'm facing issues with selecting the system during the creation process. 

I'm referring to the official SAP documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-business-application-studio/adaptation-project-on-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US  but unfortunately, couldn't get it to work.
 
I have successfully created an adaptation project with the app deployed in ABAP, but I'm stuck with extending an app deployed in BTP. Could someone please guide me on how to configure the system (BTP) in the adaptation project? Specifically:

1. Do I need to create a destination to select the BTP Subaccount?
 
2. If yes, how do I create the destination for CF Subaccount?

Any help or resources on this topic would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: CKMM - Price control from V to S - Material ledger
entry.content: La única opción que existe es analizar el tipo de de material, si éste es de consumo, su precio no debe ser estándar (Materias primas). Los productos que tienen costo estándar son los de ensamble o transformación.

entry.title: Re: New Course Home and AICC Wrapper Content - Launch button always required?
entry.content: Hi Robert, I'm not sure about the "resizable" restriction, but in my testing, the issue seems to be related to where the document resides. The same PDF document can be placed on our SAP supplied iContent server and on a company server. Using the URL from the iContent server, the document opens nicely in the AICC Wrapper frame, but the company server URL forces the user to click on the Launch button. If you still have a need to fix this, have you tried the workaround that I detailed in my comment from November?

entry.title: Sending purchase orders by type
entry.content: In SAP S/4hana 2022 is there a way to set up an exception so that certain purchase order types are not sent to suppliers? Currently all types are sent automatically.

entry.title: Tax code for sales and purchase
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am configuring Tax on sales and purchase. However, I am unable to find Account key as MWS or VST in the list. How can i create one?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector upgrade in high availability environment with SUSE Linux OS
entry.content: Nice blog. You described the upgrade process very well. It is going to help much. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: which error did you get in RETURN (also post more relevant part of code) for 04

entry.title: Re: Video series on flexible programming model for SAP Fiori elements
entry.content:
@ChandanSingh In general the indexedDB is invalidated once one of the following is detected:

- Ui5 version upgrade

- Metadata changes

- Manifest file change

So whenever you have a new version of your application i would expect one of the three condition to be met. Do you have more details as to when you have that problem ?

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have nece...
entry.content: Kindly compare previous lot and order status with current lot and order ,there must be some different. Share previous order status screenshot.error resulting it means something is wrong with this order

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: lwa_goodsmvt_header-pstng_date = '20250108'. lwa_goodsmvt_header-doc_date = '20250108'. *lwa_goodsmvt_header- = '70002413'. st_goodsmvt_code-gm_code = '03'. *Item data lwa_goodsmvt_item-material = 'PB500145'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-po_number = '70002413'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-po_item = '00001'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-entry_qnt = '1'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-entry_uom = 'EA'. * lwa_goodsmvt_item-batch = <lwa_itm>-charg. lwa_goodsmvt_item-prod_date = '20250108'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-move_type = '351'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-plant = 'XXXX'. "Hiding plant *lwa_goodsmvt_item-stge_loc = '0001'. lwa_goodsmvt_item-mvt_ind = lc_b. lwa_goodsmvt_item-stck_type = 'F'. APPEND lwa_goodsmvt_item TO lt_goodsmvt_item. CLEAR: lwa_goodsmvt_item. CLEAR:lw_mblnr. * BAPI for Post Goods Receipt CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE' EXPORTING goodsmvt_header = lwa_goodsmvt_header goodsmvt_code = st_goodsmvt_code IMPORTING materialdocument = lw_mblnr TABLES goodsmvt_item = lt_goodsmvt_item return = lt_ret. READ TABLE lt_ret INTO lwa_return WITH KEY type = lc_e. IF sy-subrc EQ 0. CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'. lwa_return-type = lc_e. APPEND lwa_return TO lt_return. CLEAR: lwa_return. ELSE. * saving Goods issue CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT' EXPORTING wait = lc_x. endif.

entry.title: Re: How it's like beeing a "Top ABAP Blogger"
entry.content: @joachimrees1I landed on this post today because I made a typo when searching for "ABAP logger". 🙂 Congratulations on your success!

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content:
lwa_goodsmvt_header-pstng_date = '20250109'.

lwa_goodsmvt_header-doc_date = '20250109'.

lwa_goodsmvt_header- = '70002413'.

st_goodsmvt_code-gm_code = '04'.

Item data lwa_goodsmvt_item-material = 'PB500145'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-po_number = '70002413'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-po_item = '00001'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-entry_qnt = '1'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-entry_uom = 'EA'.

 

. lwa_goodsmvt_item-prod_date = '20250109'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-move_type = '351'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-plant = 'XXXX'.  "hiding plant

lwa_goodsmvt_item-stge_loc = '0001'.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-mvt_ind = lc_b.

lwa_goodsmvt_item-stck_type = 'F'.

APPEND lwa_goodsmvt_item TO lt_goodsmvt_item.

CLEAR: lwa_goodsmvt_item. CLEAR:lw_mblnr.

* BAPI for Post Goods Receipt

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE

 EXPORTING

goodsmvt_header = lwa_goodsmvt_header

goodsmvt_code = st_goodsmvt_code

IMPORTING materialdocument = lw_mblnr

TABLES goodsmvt_item = lt_goodsmvt_item

return = lt_ret.

READ TABLE lt_ret INTO lwa_return WITH KEY type = lc_e.

IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.

lwa_return-type = lc_e.

APPEND lwa_return TO lt_return.

CLEAR: lwa_return.

ELSE. * saving Goods issue

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'

EXPORTING wait = lc_x.

endif.


error:Purchase order xxxxxx

does not exist

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP Content Agent Service (Video)
entry.content:
HI @BorisZarske ,

No, same error message for this link as well.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: Where can I start learning SAP S/4HANA Utilities?
entry.content:
Hi @Matt89 , 

the Utilities certification was retired and there is no new certification planned for any industry. 

We encourage you to pass the Clean Corre, BTP and other relevant certifications and collect record of achievement by answering the assessment questions of the  Executing Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Utilities and Transitioning to SAP S/4HANA for Utilities. Generally, you will find new utilities-specific courses on the Utilities Learning Page.  

Thanks,

Greg

Global Portfolio Manager for Industries,
SAP Product & Solution Learning, SIX Solution and Innovation Experience

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Adaptation Transport Organizer
entry.content: Thank you very much @Jocelyn_Dart . This cleared our confusion. We are on Private Cloud.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Windows Keyboard delay
entry.content: Thanks, I will check this.

entry.title: Re: Where do we Maintain REGUH-UBKNT ( Our Account No At Bank )
entry.content: Check also table T012k and compare with any other accounts/projects that could be having correct info.

entry.title: Re: E-Mail Templates in S/4 HANA- Display table in Email Template
entry.content:
Hi, 

Sorry, but the entire idea behind using the templates is to completely separate content (data) form formatting (html). This approach is a working one, but it places parts of formatting into data preparation.

Hopefully, SAP will extend the email template syntax to include tables or even deep structures. In the mean time, I'd suggest looking into alternative template languages such as Handlebars, Moustache, or others.

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: Can't seem to get any of the templates and PPT from the adoption course.

entry.title: Re: Lessons learned while working on BW Planning – TPM project
entry.content: This is really a good source of truth to move forward with good confidence! when working on the BW objects in TPM

entry.title: Reset OriginDataLastChgUTCDateTime (accidentally set to future date)
entry.content:
Hi,

I was doing some tests with the API_MKT_CONTACT_SRV and I accidentally set the OriginDataLastChgUTCDateTime value of a contact to a future date.

Now the system is not accepting any more updates as it says "Imported entry xxx outdated (existing data valid from [future date]".

Is there some way by which I can reset or set back this date?

Because whatever update I try to to set it back to today, it keeps saying it does not want to perform the update.

entry.title: anyone knows how to overcome this problem: when i try to go to cloud logging dashboard
entry.content: cloud logging is redirected to aythenticator which lead to an error - the results i cant login to CLS

Thanks,

Swetha

Leean

entry.title: Re: Generate an ID number in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: What exactly did you do in the script? You would need a persistence to generate a sequential ID. This is not part of process automation. So, I doubt if you can generate a sequential ID using a script. You will need an external service with persistance.

entry.title: Re: Can we upload a docker compose file to BTP Cloud Foun...
entry.content: You can run containers in BTP Cloud Foundry (check https://github.com/SAP-samples/cf-mta-examples/tree/main/cf-app-docker). But you can't just provide a Docker compose file.

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud UM – Enhancing Report Management with the power of generative AI copilot – Joule

also thx for the very helpful Information.

Got a question: 

If you ask Joule to display specific reports from PaPM, will Joule then trigger the corresponding function chain in PaPM right at that moment ?

Best Regards

Marcus

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content:
From the SAP Learning Hub, other courses were fine to play and view the content, but for this course access denied always appears.  

SAP LeanIX Roll-out and Adoption Toolkit Roadmap Template.pptx

This XML file does not appear to have any style information associated with it. The document tree is shown below.
<Error>
<Code>AccessDenied</Code>
<Message>Access denied</Message>
</Error>

entry.title: How to change Checkbox state to true of a object in a sapgui Tree?
entry.content:
Hello, I need to create a sapgui scripting code to select a file in a sap tree based on its name. To do this, I recorded a script selecting an item in the tree and setting its checkbox to true. This generated the following code:

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").selectItem "Child12","2"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").ensureVisibleHorizontalItem "Child12","2"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").changeCheckbox "Child12","2",true

From this and visiting the sapgui api documentation, I built a code to get the subnodes and then change the status of the checkbox to 1 which is equal to true, using the GetSubNodesCol and GetSubNodeTextByKey functions. However, this did not work.
Here is my code:

Set tree = session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell")
Set ListNodeKeys = tree.getallnodekeys

For Each nodeKey In ListNodeKeys
    nodeText = tree.GetNodeTextByKey(nodeKey)
    If nodeText = "TBR" Then
        Set SubNodeKeys = tree.GetSubNodesCol(nodeKey)
        
        For Each subNodeKey In SubNodeKeys
            subNodeText = tree.GetNodeTextByKey(subNodeKey)
            If subNodeText = "FAT_TBR_xxxx" Then 
               tree.SetCheckBoxState(subNodeKey,1)
               MsgBox "Subnó: " & subNodeText
            End If   
        Next
    End If
Next

 

Here is a picture of what the tree looks like where I need to change the checkbox of the files based on the name.

Thank you
Markus

entry.title: Re: Can we upload a docker compose file to BTP Cloud Foun...
entry.content: Okay, I will try and write back whatever the result I will get

entry.title: Re: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content: Hi William,

entry.title: OSE + table + selection type: single + left click => no onSelect
entry.content:
Hi,
could anyone with SAC and a live BW connection please confirm that onSelect is not triggerd by a left click (but with a right click) when:

  • unified story mode used
  • live BW connection (ours: 7.5 SP 31)
  • table with 1 measure in columns & 1 dimension in rows
  • selection type: single

     


    A single left click in the table should trigger the onSelect event. This is not the case anymore. Now in order to trigger onSelect you have to right click into the table.
    When Selection Type is set to Default then a left click triggers onSelect.

ty for your help
BR
E.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: Try to add leading zeroes to STO / PO number

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content: Hi William, no same error when I ran from BW side as well.

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello @KStrothmann 

    Previously we have implemented Event Mesh standalone application as POC and integrated with our S4HANA 2020 SP02 system.  We were able to create channel with service key and able to push S4HANA events to the event mesh.

 Unfortunately, after the migration of event mesh to IS , we are not able to activate channel in S4HANA. Getting bad request error.

  After migrating to EMIS, we have created RFC destination, OAuth manually in SAP and then provided these details in the channel. We are unable to activate the channel now in S4HANA 2020 sp02.

 Also, the instance generated in BTP for new EMIS does not have "namespace".

 

Thank you,

Shiva

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: Can you try this link: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/h8zqfdU/20240215_LeanIX_Roll-out_and_Adoption_Toolkit.pdf?inline=true&rc=10&doi=SAP1150339 and let me know if you still get an error?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – App Variants are the EASY way to control App Features
entry.content:
Great blog, thanks!

I was able to get it up and running in the development system but can not transport it to test/prd.

When I publish the app variant, I linked it to the workbench request I had created in SE01 but only see antry with R3TR/LRCD....in it. When I transport this to test, the app variant is not visible.

Can you tell me which object I should normally see in the workbench request?

 

Kr

Michiel

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: This link works, thanks.

entry.title: Re: MD04 - Storage Location stock below Available Stock?
entry.content:
Hello @PiotrPuczka 

I guess you can achieve that with BAdI MD_ADD_ELEMENTS. MRP list or stock/requirements list can be manipulated here - just move the not planned SLOC segment. However be aware that not planned SLOC is a different MRP planning segment from the plant/MRP area. Thus such a change might have far reaching side effects - test thoroughly. Or better yet, convince the customer that it is not a business critical change and it should not be implemented.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: Glad to hear it!

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE Migration Options for Partner
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for the blog, it is very hard to find some detailed steps on the procedure. I have a question about "1.1  System Copy process S/4HANA to S/4HANA".

On the migration server, what activities exactly are performed? The partner installs an ASCS and PAS without installing a database instance and then the partner performs a database refresh/move to the existing database under rise?

Are there any guides/Community articles where this is described further?

I only found this other article https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/partner-led-migration-rise-with-sap-step-by-step-process/ba-p/13562147

 

Thank you1
